name: Dissolver
description: Spectral smearing pad generator. Kills transients, preserves harmonic content, and blends temporality into evolving pads. Inspired by GRM Tools Evolution.
author: fillioning

parameters.name: Smoothing
parameters.description: Transient suppression strength. At max, all attacks are erased.

parameters.name: Freeze
parameters.description: How much spectral content is held vs. updated from new input.

parameters.name: Grain Size
parameters.description: Window size for the overlap-add smearing. Small = detailed, large = blurred.

parameters.name: Density
parameters.description: Grain overlap factor. Higher = thicker, more pad-like texture.

parameters.name: Evolution
parameters.description: Rate at which the frozen spectrum drifts and morphs over time.

parameters.name: Brightness
parameters.description: Spectral tilt. Low = dark/warm, high = bright/airy.

parameters.name: Dry/Wet
parameters.description: Blend between dry input and dissolved pad output.

parameters.name: Decay
parameters.description: How long the pad tail sustains after input stops.
